summary: No-ship: round-1 presence-toggle error handling is resolved, but the new Compose overview copy still misstates component management capabilities.

findings.title: Claude Code components blurb over-promises enable/edit support
findings.recommendation: Revise the blurb to avoid saying every component can be enabled/disabled and edited. Plugins are not editable here, and skills are not presence toggles; use neutral copy such as reviewing components and managing supported actions in Quarters.
